title: Addvancement!
description: A mod that Adds some fun and silly Advancements :)
body:
We all Love advancements, They're just one more part of Minecraft that acts as a fun challenge. 

But what if you wanted more? 

Introducing 

**ADDvancements!**

Addvancements adds about 13 fun little advancements to give a little bit of fun if your bored or want a challenge 

These advancements are both a combonation of some of the playstation acheivements and One's I made myself! 

(Don't worru,There will be more advancements in the future) 

This Mod is made with Mcreator,I'm sorry if this mod cause any lag and/or bugs
